PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?university ?universityLabel ?foundingDate WHERE {
  ?university wdt:P463 wd:Q49113 .
  ?university wdt:P571 ?foundingDate .
  ?university rdfs:label ?universityLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?universityLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ASC(?foundingDate)
